projectDescription: Python SDK that adds FSM-based step scoring, E-trace steering injection, health monitoring, and intelligent model routing to LangChain and OpenAI Agents applications.
keyFeatures: FSM-based difficulty scoring that routes agents between fast/slow/skip modes
E-trace injection system (E1 instance-level, E2 pattern-level, E3 universal) for steering agents
Server-side trajectory monitors for detecting loops, hedging, edit-revert thrashing, and test-repeat failures
Intelligent model routing — swap to a cheaper or stronger model based on agent difficulty state
CodebaseMemory for persistent per-repo findings with semantic recall across agent runs
ImportGraph with blast-radius queries to track downstream impact of file changes
TokenSavingMiddleware for compressing stale tool outputs and nudging stuck agents to exit early
Framework integrations for LangChain, Anthropic Messages API, Claude Agent SDK, and OpenAI Agents
publicApiSurface: ReasonBlocks(api_key, *, base_url, token_budget, monitor_names, fsm_thresholds, model_routing, e_traces_enabled, customer_id, live_streaming_enabled, task_profile)
ReasonBlocks.middleware(*, run_id, agent_name, task, framework, model, codebase_id, org_id, project_id, metadata) -> ReasonBlocksMiddleware
ReasonBlocksConfig (dataclass with all capability toggles and tunable parameters)
build_middleware(config, api, *, score_fn, fsm, state_manager, model_routing, run_id, run_metadata) -> list
TokenSavingMiddleware(*, compress_threshold_chars, keep_recent_tool_messages, enable_compression, enable_early_exit, signals_fn, ...)
make_langchain_tools(memory, graph, *, recall_top_k, recall_threshold, enable_recall, enable_store, enable_impact) -> list
make_claude_tools(memory, graph, *, recall_top_k, recall_threshold, enable_store, enable_impact) -> tuple[list, Callable]
make_openai_tools(memory, graph, *, recall_top_k, recall_threshold, enable_recall, enable_store, enable_impact) -> list
FSMState (enum: INIT, FAST, NORMAL, SLOW, SKIP, END)
ETrace (dataclass: tier, similarity, pattern_id, fields, failure_type, model_family)
StepRecord (dataclass: step_index, thought, action, action_input, observation, difficulty, state, tokens_used)
TraceState (dataclass: trace_id, steps, current_state, difficulty_history, total_tokens, token_budget)
